name: Wood or Wedge
about: Wood or Wedge is a golf simulator venue offering private bays equipped with Trackman IO technology. The facility provides 24/7 access and focuses on affordable precision simulation with over 400 premium courses available for play. Memberships are offered with various time slot options, and the venue includes amenities such as snacks and drinks for guests.
why_golfers_like_it: Two private Trackman IO bays for precision simulation
24/7 access for flexible practice and play
Affordable membership options with multiple time slot choices
Over 400 premium courses available to play

simulator_hardware.notes: Two private Trackman IO bays available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Snacks and drinks are available on-site, but BYOB policies are not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, but it does mention the ability to play over 400 premium courses.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of kid-friendly features or services on the website.
